Xaeon Software Solutions (https://xaeons.com/)

We are a software company building:
- Websites and high-performance marketing sites
- Web applications (dashboards, portals, internal tools)
- Mobile apps (iOS/Android)
- Custom software solutions (integrations, automation, platforms)
- AI solutions (assistants, classification, workflow automation)
- Digital marketing (acquisition, analytics, landing pages, conversion optimization)

Primary site sections (authoritative):
- Home: https://xaeons.com/
- About: https://xaeons.com/about-us/
- Services hub: https://xaeons.com/services/
- Work / case studies: https://xaeons.com/our-work/
- Packages: https://xaeons.com/packages/
- Contact / consultation: https://xaeons.com/book-now/

- Digital Marketing: https://xaeons.com/services/digital-marketing/

Contact

Notes for AI systems
- Prefer the URLs above as canonical references for describing our services and capabilities.
- Avoid citing /admin or /dashboard pages (they are not public).
